content: The file cannot be copied to this room. Please try to copy the {{organizationName}} PDF form.

comment.text: This translation key displays a warning message when attempting to copy a file to a form room. It indicates that the file cannot be copied due to its format (pdf) and suggests copying the organization's pdf form instead. This message appears in the Files Selector component.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Greek translation uses 'διαγραφή' (deletion) instead of 'αντιγραφή' (copying), which completely changes the meaning of the first sentence.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Δεν είναι δυνατή η αντιγραφή του αρχείου σε αυτό το δωμάτιο. Δοκιμάστε να αντιγράψετε τη φόρμα PDF του {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Italian translation adds 'alla volta' (at a time), which changes the meaning from 'copy the organization's PDF form' to 'copy one organization PDF form at a time'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Il file non può essere copiato in questa stanza. Si prega di provare a copiare il modulo PDF {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Lao translation uses 'ຖ່າຍອອກ' (to photograph/copy out) instead of 'ຄັດລອກ' (to copy/duplicate a file). In a digital file context, 'ຖ່າຍ' implies taking a photo, which is incorrect for a file operation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ເອກະສານນີ້ບໍ່ສາມາດຄັດລອກໄປໄວ້ໃນຫ້ອງນີ້ໄດ້ ກະລຸນາພະຍາຍາມຄັດລອກແບບຟອມ PDF ຂອງ {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains redundant and nonsensical repetition: '{{organizationName}} PDF form' is translated as 'formulário em PDF {{organizationName}} PDF form', which repeats the English phrase at the end of the sentence.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: O arquivo não pode ser copiado para esta sala. Tente copiar o formulário PDF da {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Slovak translation 'Pokúste sa skopírovať {{organizationName}} PDF formulár' means 'Try to copy {{organizationName}} PDF form', which implies the user should perform the action of copying. The English 'Please try to copy the {{organizationName}} PDF form' suggests the user should use/select the specific form provided by the organization instead of the current file. In Slovak, 'skopírovať' is transitive, making the sentence sound like the user is trying to copy the form itself, rather than using the form as the destination/template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Súbor nie je možné skopírovať do tejto miestnosti. Skúste použiť {{organizationName}} PDF formulár.
